description: Celebrate the New Year with this customizable dine out guide. There is plenty of customizable space to showcase a variety of restaurants, bars, and cafes. This template could be used by a chamber of commerce, travel guide, or business association to promote local establishments and holiday events. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
